backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two Internet Identity authentication features (login/logout button and principal display) to their implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Pulse app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app entry that sets up TanStack Router with routes for home, search, create, notifications, and profile pages, all wrapped in ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AvatarPlaceholde: Reusable avatar component that renders a colored circle with user initials, supporting five size variants.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component that composes the Navigation sidebar, a main content outlet with desktop offset, and a Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation component with a desktop sidebar and mobile bottom tab bar that integrates Internet Identity login/logout, showing a spinner during login, truncated principal when authenticated, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Interactive post card component featuring like/save/share/comment actions, hashtag highlighting, optional gradient image, and an expandable inline comment section with TanStack Router links.
frontend/src/components/PostComposer.tsx: Post creation form with an auto-resizing textarea, a gradient image picker with preview, and a submit handler that constructs and emits a new Post object.
frontend/src/components/StoriesBar.tsx: Renders a horizontal stories bar with an 'Add Story' button and clickable user story avatars, opening a modal dialog viewer with a progress animation when a story is clicked.
Displays a sidebar with a ranked list of trending hashtags and, optionally, a 'Suggested for you' section with follow buttons for mock users.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for light/dark theme management, persisting the preference to localStorage and syncing it with the document root class.
frontend/src/data/mockData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and exports static mock data arrays for users, posts, comments, stories, notifications, and trending hashtags used throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed since the app uses only local mock data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, configures Tailwind, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system along with utility classes for gradients and scrollbars.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePost.tsx: A page component that renders a PostComposer inside a card with a back button, navigating to home on post submission.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The main home feed page showing a stories bar, post composer, list of posts, and a trending sidebar for desktop layouts.
frontend/src/pages/Notifications.tsx: Notifications page displaying mock like/comment/follow/mention notifications with unread filtering, mark-as-read, and per-type icon/color config.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: User profile page showing avatar, cover, bio, stats, follow/message buttons, and tabbed post grid, with Internet Identity integration to display the authenticated principal on own profile.
frontend/src/pages/Search.tsx: Search page with a text input that filters mock users, posts, and hashtags in real time, displaying categorized results alongside a trending sidebar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom shadows, border radii, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the current version, feature list, architectural notes, and known issues for the Pulse social media app.
